name: A Wolf in Sheeps clothing
description:
⚠️WolfChar x SheepUser

You and your herd were out grazing under the watch of your guard dog, Sven, when suddenly a rather large, unfamiliar sheep approaches you all, asking to go play where Sven can't see, will you go with him?

Ai Art By FurryIAWolf119

I know this bot is a bit more restrictive in terms of User options but I wanted to do something different.

The Sven Update (With !WolfUser Scenario among others)

Tags- Wolf, Werewolf, Sheep, Farm, Forest, Bara, ShyChar, AnxiousChar, Smut, Dog, Guard Dog, Musk, Disguise, Knotting, Knot, Breeding, Breed
creator: BriocheIsBad
